examples.title: Dynamic Array Allocation and Sum
examples.description: Program to allocate memory for n integers and calculate their sum
examples.explanation: Demonstrates malloc for dynamic allocation, pointer arithmetic for array access, and importance of free(). The pointer 'arr' acts like an array after allocation.

examples.title: Reverse Array Using Pointers
examples.description: Program to reverse array elements using two-pointer technique
examples.explanation: Uses two pointers starting from both ends moving towards center, swapping elements. Demonstrates pointer comparison and dereferencing.

examples.title: Dynamic 2D Matrix Allocation
examples.description: Program to create, use, and free a dynamic 2D matrix
examples.explanation: Demonstrates pointer-to-pointer for 2D arrays, careful memory allocation with error checking, multiple levels of pointer dereferencing for element access, and proper memory cleanup.

examples.title: Pointer Demonstration - Array Pointer Relationship
examples.description: Program demonstrating various pointer-array expressions and their equivalence
examples.explanation: Shows equivalence of array and pointer notation, demonstrates that arr gives address of first element while &arr gives address of entire array, shows sizeof difference between array and pointer.
